content.rendered:
Ceramic Coating

Our top-quality ceramic coatings are designed to enhance and protect your vehicle’s finish, providing a durable shield against UV rays, bird droppings, tree sap, and more. Enjoy a deep, lasting gloss and a finish that’s easy to maintain, with a single wash restoring that showroom shine.

BOOK ONLINE
CALL NOW
BOOK ONLINE
CALL NOW

Why Choose Our Ceramic Coatings?

  • Unmatched Protection: Our ceramic coatings offer a resilient barrier, preserving your paint from environmental damage.
  • Superior Gloss: Achieve a high-gloss finish that keeps your vehicle looking like new.
  • Ease of Maintenance: No more frequent waxing—ceramic coatings make it easy to keep your car clean.
  • Professional Application: Our skilled team ensures a flawless application for maximum protection and durability.

Our Ceramic Coating Process

Our five-step process ensures that each vehicle receives a comprehensive and durable ceramic coating, enhancing both protection and aesthetic appeal.

1. Surface Preparation
We start by washing and decontaminating your vehicle to remove any surface impurities. This step is essential for ensuring that the coating adheres seamlessly and effectively shields the paint.

2. Paint Correction
Using professional-grade polishing tools, we correct imperfections like light scratches and swirl marks. This process creates a smooth, flawless base, allowing the ceramic coating to highlight the paint’s depth and gloss.

3. Application
The ceramic coating is applied in controlled sections, using precise tools to ensure an even and thorough coating. This careful approach locks in the vehicle’s shine and ensures an even layer of protection across all surfaces.

4. Curing
After application, the coating needs time to bond with the paint. This curing stage is crucial for strengthening the protective barrier, enhancing the durability and longevity of the coating.

5. Final Inspection
We inspect every part of the vehicle to ensure the coating is applied evenly and that the finish is smooth, glossy, and ready to endure the elements.

Call Now For a Free Quote

Fill Out The Form Below To Get a Free Personalised Quote
Or
Call Us Directly at (603) 998-6080
